extraction.one_line_summary: DENZ Nico won Stage 14 after BETIOL Alberto's premature 300m sprint failed, while ARMIRAIL Bruno took maglia rosa via 12+ minute breakaway gap.
tactical_patterns: BETIOL Alberto launching at 300m on uphill finish spent group, allowing fresher finishers to counter-punch effectively.
INEOS controlled chase knowing ARMIRAIL Bruno's 18.5min deficit made him low threat, gifting him 1:41 GC lead.
Four-man break fractured when ARMIRAIL Bruno traveled in third group, proving GC positioning trumps stage collaboration.

rider_signals.DENZ Nico: positive: second stage in three days shows breakaway reading ability and diverse finish speed
rider_signals.GEE Derek: neutral: third second-place finish this Giro suggests strong but mistimed sprint positioning
rider_signals.BETIOL Alberto: negative: premature sprint launch on uphill finish reveals poor pacing judgment under pressure
rider_signals.ARMIRAIL Bruno: positive: 18.5min deficit workman taking rosa shows INEOS miscalculated threat threshold by 24 seconds
rider_signals.BAIZ David: neutral: retook KOM via Stage 13 neutralization points, tactical jersey management rather than climbing dominance
